grades.expectation: Response identifies 68 years as a critical lease length issue
grades.reason: Explicitly states '68 years remaining, this flat falls into the CRITICAL lease band'

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific lender names and their minimum requirements (not just 'most lenders want 70+ years')
grades.reason: Names Halifax, Barclays (70 years minimum), Santander, Nationwide (55 years minimum) with specific requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions marriage value applies below 80 years
grades.reason: Clearly states 'Because the lease is below 80 years, marriage value applies under current law'

grades.expectation: Response discusses lease extension options (statutory Section 42, informal, assign benefit)
grades.reason: Covers all three: statutory lease extension, informal/voluntary extension, and assigning benefit of Section 42 claim

grades.expectation: Response quantifies the price impact (discount percentage or range)
grades.reason: States 'expect a meaningful discount... often in the 15–30%+ range'

grades.expectation: Response mentions reduced buyer pool due to mortgage restrictions
grades.reason: States 'Buyer pool is restricted: many mortgage buyers will struggle, so you'll lose a chunk of mainstream purchasers'
